slides.hook: No-code AI sales just got patented
slides.body: SalesCloser received a U.S. patent for its graph-based AI system, enabling sales workflow creation without coding. This marks a significant step in accessible AI development.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal, structured layout with black/white base and orange accent color. Left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Daily 'AI for Work' Pulse: 3rd of May
